vBRIEFInfo.author: panopticon-cli/0.0.0
vBRIEFInfo.description: Plan for PAN-494: pan start fails if workspace doesn't exist — requires separate pan workspace create

plan.title: pan start fails if workspace doesn't exist — requires separate pan workspace create
plan.author: agent:claude-opus-4-6

narratives.Problem: pan start errors out when no workspace exists, requiring a manual pan workspace create step. The dashboard already auto-creates workspaces, so the CLI is inconsistent.
narratives.Proposal: Replace the error-and-exit block in issue.ts with auto-creation logic using execAsync to call pan workspace create, matching the dashboard's existing pattern.

items.title: Auto-create workspace in pan start when missing

narrative.Action: In src/cli/commands/work/issue.ts, replace the error block at lines 543-555 with workspace auto-creation logic. When findWorkspaceWithLocation returns no workspace: (1) update spinner to 'Creating workspace for {id}...', (2) call execAsync('pan workspace create ${id} --local') with projectRoot as cwd, (3) set workspace to the expected path and continue, (4) on failure, show error and exit. Follow the same pattern used in src/dashboard/server/routes/agents.ts:1135-1148.

subItems.title: pan start PAN-XXX succeeds when no workspace exists, creating the workspace automatically
pan start PAN-XXX still works normally when workspace already exists (no regression)
If workspace creation fails, a clear error message is shown (not a cryptic crash)
